name: assistente-vida
description: Sistema pessoal de organizacao com web mobile, API, PostgreSQL e Telegram.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.local:setup: npm run local:generate -w apps/api && npm run local:db -w apps/api && npm run seed -w apps/api
